releaseNotes: Focus sessions now show a per-pickup timeline. After a session ends, expanding the past-session card shows each phone pickup with its timestamp and duration (matching the Sleep tab). Built on the same local-first, reactive, idempotent foundation from v2.16.14 — v2.16.17 so the duplicate / staleness / offline-loss bug classes can't recur. Backend POST /phone-pickups/batch is now idempotent via client UUIDs and ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Older focus sessions logged before v2.16.18 still show just the pickup count, since per-pickup detail wasn't recorded at the time — going forward every session has the timeline.
